\tzpentry{ID5848}{Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5848 introduces Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi_{BEC}(\mathbf{r},t) = \sqrt{n(\mathbf{r},t)} e^{i\phi(\mathbf{r},t)} \end{equation}
